display_information.name: Threshold
display_information.description: Multilingual belonging agent for small churches — connect newcomers to life groups, classes, and volunteering without a referral.

assistant_view.assistant_description: I'm Threshold — your guide to getting connected at church. I speak many languages and can help you find life groups, English classes, volunteering, and more. No referral needed.

suggested_prompts.title: Find a group
suggested_prompts.message: I'd like to meet some people and find a group to join.

suggested_prompts.title: Volunteer
suggested_prompts.message: I'd love to help out — what volunteering opportunities are there?

suggested_prompts.title: English classes
suggested_prompts.message: Are there any English conversation or language classes?

suggested_prompts.title: This week's news
suggested_prompts.message: What's happening at church this week?

slash_commands.description: Manually send a welcome DM to a member
Send a translated announcement digest to opted-in members
